entity.summary: Cryptocurrency exchange project whose historical first-party development repository remains available while the former exchange domain now serves unrelated forex and investing content.
entity.notes: Classified inactive rather than dead because the reviewed sources establish historical exchange identity and current domain repurposing but not a confirmed shutdown date.

evidence.title: CoinCasso wallet repository API configuration
evidence.notes: First-party project repository contains a CoinCasso API reference under the coincasso.io domain, corroborating the historical service identity.

evidence.title: CoinCasso exchange registry entry
evidence.notes: Registry source identifies CoinCasso as an exchange candidate; current domain review found unrelated forex and investing content.
